violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Cardboard on back racks need to be removed. -Pallets for storage need to be painted or clear stained. -Do not reuse cardboard boxes for donut delivery.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
